settings.title: Built for the guy who already knows what he wants
settings.body: The Right Garment is a curated menswear directory for quality-conscious buyers. No activewear. No fast fashion.

settings.title: The menswear internet is broken. We are fixing the index.
settings.body: Most brand directories optimize for volume and novelty. We optimize for quality, relevance, and shopping clarity.

settings.quote: The best wardrobe isn't the biggest one. It's the one that requires the fewest decisions.

settings.title: Every brand is manually evaluated.
settings.body: Each listing is reviewed for quality signals, durability expectations, and shipping practicality for Canadian and US buyers.

settings.title: Quality over completeness
settings.body: We would rather have 300 sharp entries than thousands of low-signal options.

settings.title: Real data, not affiliate fluff
settings.body: Shipping policies and return context are surfaced to support real buying decisions.

settings.title: Canada-first shipping intelligence
settings.body: Cross-border costs matter. We prioritize clarity around duties and delivery terms.

settings.title: No activewear, no fast fashion
settings.body: This is a deliberate editorial scope built around long-term wardrobe quality.

settings.heading: Who's behind this
settings.body:
The Right Garment is an independent project built by a small team in Montreal.

We have no investors and no paid editorial relationships.

settings.title: The occasional well-edited email
settings.body: New brands, restocks, and shopping intelligence. No noise.
